Name: Air Evacuation
Effect: Move one of your units to any location you control.
Flavor: Tactical retreat. That's what we're calling it.

Name: Emergency Reinforcements
Condition: You have a unit or garrison at the location
Effect: Add +2 Strength to your unit or garrison for this contest.
Flavor: Turns out there were more of them.

Name: Vulture
Effect: Steal the Scrap they would have received.
Flavor: You did all that work. Shame.

Name: Bad Roads
Trigger Event: An enemy unit declares a move
Effect: That unit's movement is reduced by 1 for this move. Minimum 1.
Flavor: The route looked fine on the map.

Name: Emergency Protocols
Trigger Event: An enemy unit initiates a contest against you
Effect: Force the attacker to spend 2 additional Scrap or abandon the contest.
Flavor: This is going to cost you more than you planned.

Name: Scavengers
column9: Take something on the way out.

Name: Counterfeit Orders
Trigger Event: An enemy player takes an Action
Condition: You have a unit adjacent to their target location
Flavor: The orders looked legitimate. They weren't.

Name: Sabotage
Effect: Disable one chip at a target location.
Flavor: You don't have to win to make it hurt.

Name: Forced March
Effect: One of your units may move again this turn.

Name: Inside Information
Trigger Event: Any player draws an encounter card
Effect: Look at the drawn encounter card before it is resolved. You may resolve it instead.
Flavor: Knowledge isn't power. Knowing first is.

Name: Last Stand
Trigger Event: One of your units would be forced to retreat
Effect: That unit holds its position. It takes a +4 to Strength until the start of your next turn.
